skeletons: That's the read. He {cue_atom_short_desc}, so you {action_short_desc}.
You shot it off the catch. {decoder_micro_explainer}
He {cue_atom_short_desc}, so you {action_short_desc} before his hands were up.
Right read, one dribble too many. He {cue_atom_short_desc} — {action_short_desc} off the catch.
The {partial_choice_short_desc} got you a shot. The catch-and-shoot was the cleaner one.
The {partial_choice_short_desc} works against a flying closeout. This one was short — {action_short_desc} was open.
You drove past an open shot. He {cue_atom_short_desc}; {action_short_desc}.
The {wrong_choice_short_desc} lets him reset. {action_short_desc} while he is still short.
